biological_replicate: Drosophila melanogaster and mouse models of infection
technical_replicate: Each sample was digested and run in triplicate injections.
experimental_design: we deleted the gtrS-gltR locus encoding the GtrS-GltR TCS in the P. aeruginosa reference strain PAO1.
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.
number_of_biological_replicates: Drosophila melanogaster and mouse models of infection
number_of_samples: 2 biological replicates (1 mouse model and 1 Drosophila)
